endpoints.name: GET /v4/accounts
endpoints.description: Lists all of the accounts for the authenticated user. This includes all accounts that the user owns, as well as any accounts for which the user has management rights.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/accounts
endpoints.description: Creates an account with the specified name and type under the given parent. - Personal accounts and Organizations cannot be created. - User Groups cannot be created with a Personal account as primary owner. - Location Groups cannot be created with a primary owner of a Personal account if the Personal account is in an Organization. - Location Groups cannot own Location Groups.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/attributes
endpoints.description: Returns the list of available attributes that would be available for a location with the given primary category and country.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/categories
endpoints.description: Returns a list of business categories. Search will match the category name but not the category ID. *Note:* Search only matches the front of a category name (that is, 'food' may return 'Food Court' but not 'Fast Food Restaurant').
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/categories:batchGet
endpoints.description: Returns a list of business categories for the provided language and GConcept ids.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/chains:search
endpoints.description: Searches the chain based on chain name.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/googleLocations:search
endpoints.description: Search all of the possible locations that are a match to the specified request.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets the specified chain. Returns `NOT_FOUND` if the chain does not exist.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PUT /v4/{name}
endpoints.description: Sets the pubsub notification settings for the account informing Business Profile which topic to send pubsub notifications for: - New reviews for locations administered by the account. - Updated reviews for locations administered by the account. - New `GoogleUpdates` for locations administered by the account. An account will only have one notification settings resource, and only one pubsub topic can be set.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v4/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes a specific question written by the current user.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v4/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates a specific question written by the current user.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{name}/localPosts:reportInsights
endpoints.description: Returns insights for a set of local posts associated with a single listing. Which metrics and how they are reported are options specified in the request proto. *Note:* Insight reports are limited to 100 `local_post_names` per call.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{name}/locations:batchGet
endpoints.description: Gets all of the specified locations in the given account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{name}/locations:batchGetReviews
endpoints.description: Returns the paginated list of reviews for all specified locations. This operation is only valid if the specified locations are verified. *Note:* Reviews are limited to a batch size of 200 `location_names` per call.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{name}/locations:reportInsights
endpoints.description: Returns a report containing insights on one or more metrics by location. *Note:* Insight reports are limited to a batch size of 10 `location_names` per call.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PUT /v4/{name}/reply
endpoints.description: Updates the reply to the specified review. A reply is created if one does not exist. This operation is only valid if the specified location is verified.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v4/{name}/reply
endpoints.description: Deletes the response to the specified review. This operation is only valid if the specified location is verified.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{name}:accept
endpoints.description: Accepts the specified invitation.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{name}:associate
endpoints.description: Associates a location to a place ID. Any previous association is overwritten. This operation is only valid if the location is unverified. The association must be valid, that is, it appears in the list of `FindMatchingLocations`.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{name}:clearAssociation
endpoints.description: Clears an association between a location and its place ID. This operation is only valid if the location is unverified.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{name}:complete
endpoints.description: Completes a `PENDING` verification. It is only necessary for non `AUTO` verification methods. `AUTO` verification request is instantly `VERIFIED` upon creation.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{name}:decline
endpoints.description: Declines the specified invitation.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{name}:fetchVerificationOptions
endpoints.description: Reports all eligible verification options for a location in a specific language.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{name}:findMatches
endpoints.description: Finds all of the possible locations that are a match to the specified location. This operation is only valid if the location is unverified.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{name}:generateAccountNumber
endpoints.description: Generates an account number for this account. The account number is not provisioned when an account is created. Use this request to create an account number when it is required.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/{name}:getGoogleUpdated
endpoints.description: Returns the Google updated Lodging of a specific location.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/{name}:googleUpdated
endpoints.description: Gets the Google-updated version of the specified location. Returns `NOT_FOUND` if the location does not exist.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/{name}:recommendGoogleLocations
endpoints.description: List all the GoogleLocations that have been recommended to the specified Business Profile account. Recommendations are provided for personal accounts and location groups only, requests for all other account types will result in an error. The recommendations for location groups are based on the locations in that group. The recommendations for personal accounts are based on all of the locations that the user has access to on Business Profile (which includes locations they can access through location groups), and is a superset of all recommendations generated for the user.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{name}:report
endpoints.description: Report a GoogleLocation.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{name}:transfer
endpoints.description: Moves a location from an account that the user owns to another account that the same user administers. The user must be an owner of the account the location is currently associated with and must also be at least a manager of the destination account. Returns the Location with its new resource name.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{name}:verify
endpoints.description: Starts the verification process for a location.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/{parent}/admins
endpoints.description: Lists all of the admins for the specified location.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{parent}/admins
endpoints.description: Invites the specified user to become an administrator for the specified location. The invitee must accept the invitation in order to be granted access to the location. See AcceptInvitation to programmatically accept an invitation.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/{parent}/answers
endpoints.description: Returns the paginated list of answers for a specified question.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v4/{parent}/answers:delete
endpoints.description: Deletes the answer written by the current user to a question.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{parent}/answers:upsert
endpoints.description: Creates an answer or updates the existing answer written by the user for the specified question. A user can only create one answer per question.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/{parent}/insuranceNetworks
endpoints.description: Returns a list of all insurance networks supported by Google.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/{parent}/invitations
endpoints.description: Lists pending invitations for the specified account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/{parent}/localPosts
endpoints.description: Returns a list of local posts associated with a location.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{parent}/localPosts
endpoints.description: Creates a new local post associated with the specified location, and returns it.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/{parent}/locations
endpoints.description: Lists the locations for the specified account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{parent}/locations
endpoints.description: Creates a new location owned by the specified account, and returns it.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/{parent}/media
endpoints.description: Returns a list of media items associated with a location.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{parent}/media
endpoints.description: Creates a new media item for the location.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/{parent}/media/customers
endpoints.description: Returns a list of media items associated with a location that have been contributed by customers.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{parent}/media:startUpload
endpoints.description: Generates a `MediaItemDataRef` for media item uploading.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/{parent}/questions
endpoints.description: Returns the paginated list of questions and some of its answers for a specified location.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v4/{parent}/questions
endpoints.description: Adds a question for the specified location.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/{parent}/reviews
endpoints.description: Returns the paginated list of reviews for the specified location. This operation is only valid if the specified location is verified.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v4/{parent}/verifications
endpoints.description: List verifications of a location, ordered by create time.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
